citations.desc: Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC).
citations.narrative:
Two 6-month-old, male mini-pigs were listed on an expired protocol. The pigs had been placed on the protocol prior to
June 10th, 2025, the day the protocol expired. The issue was discovered in a meeting which took place on June 13th,
2025. The pigs were then transferred to an active protocol. There was no evidence of any harm or distress to the animals
as a result of this issue.
Failure to review and approve a protocol resulted in the IACUC's inability to carry out its function to review and approve
proposed activities in the care and use of animals to ensure compliance with the Animal Welfare Act. The IACUC must
review and approve all activity regarding the use of animals prior to implementation of those activities for all AWA
regulated IACUC protocols.
Corrected prior to inspection, when discovered by the facility.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representatives.
n

narrative:
2.31(c)(6) 
   
Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC). 
Two 6-month-old, male mini-pigs were listed on an expired protocol. The pigs had been placed on the protocol prior to 
June 10th, 2025, the day the protocol expired. The issue was discovered in a meeting which took place on June 13th, 
2025. The pigs were then transferred to an active protocol. There was no evidence of any harm or distress to the animals 
as a result of this issue.  
Failure to review and approve a protocol resulted in the IACUC's inability to carry out its function to review and approve 
proposed activities in the care and use of animals to ensure compliance with the Animal Welfare Act. The IACUC must 
review and approve all activity regarding the use of animals prior to implementation of those activities for all AWA 
regulated IACUC protocols.  
Corrected prior to inspection, when discovered by the facility. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a facility representatives.
